SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
SELECT MIN(?won) AS ?minWins
WHERE {
  ?tournament wdt:P31 wd:Q3232956 ;
             rdfs:label "2002 Masters"@en ;
             wdt:P585 ?eventDate.
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 2002).
  ?tournament wdt:P2513 ?player.
  ?player wdt:P569 ?birthDate.
  FILTER(YEAR(?birthDate) <= 1980).
  ?player wdt:P121 ?won.
  FILTER (isNumeric(?won))
}
```
